description: Wikipedia offline packs for S.I.N.A. Available in multiple size tiers. All use the Kiwix ZIM format.
note: URLs must be confirmed against current Kiwix library. Versions change monthly. S.I.N.A fetches the current library index to resolve actual download links.

tiers.label: Wikipedia Mini
tiers.description: The 10,000 most important articles from English Wikipedia. Covers core science, history, geography, medicine, and technology topics. Recommended starting point.

tiers.label: Wikipedia Top 100k
tiers.description: The 100,000 most-visited Wikipedia articles. Significantly broader coverage while staying manageable in size.

tiers.label: Wikipedia Medical
tiers.description: All Wikipedia articles tagged under medicine, surgery, clinical specialties, pharmacology, and anatomy.

tiers.label: Wikipedia All Articles (No Video)
tiers.description: All 6+ million English Wikipedia articles, text and images, without embedded video. A comprehensive offline knowledge base.

tiers.label: Wikipedia All Articles (With Images)
tiers.description: Complete English Wikipedia with full images. The largest and most complete offline Wikipedia available.

specialized.label: WikiMed Medical Encyclopedia
specialized.description: Standalone medical encyclopedia. Diseases, symptoms, treatments, procedures. Based on Wikipedia medical content but curated and structured for clinical use.

specialized.label: Wikipedia Mini (French)
specialized.description: Les 10 000 articles les plus importants de Wikipédia en français.

specialized.label: Wikipedia Mini (Spanish)
specialized.description: Los 10.000 artículos más importantes de Wikipedia en español.

installation_note: ZIM files require ~1.5x their compressed size in free disk space during extraction. The tile server profile must be running to serve Kiwix content through the S.I.N.A dashboard. Use Downloads → Install to manage these files.
